display_name: Unified Control Center — Migrate dashboard to Next.js, share fitme-story design system

sources: Explore subagent — fitme-story stack inventory + dashboard inventory + 3 architectures
v7.6 case study + unclosable-gaps inventory (Class B context)
User feedback 2026-04-26: Arch A confirmed + blind-switch + future-extraction added

ux_or_integration.compliance_decision: PASS conditional on T16 contrast audit (axe MCP) before production deploy

tasks.title: Instrument current Astro dashboard with TTC events (dashboard_load + dashboard_blocker_acknowledged)
Capture 7 days of TTC baseline data → baseline-ttc.json
tasks.note: T2 placeholder shipped per PRD section 5.1 allowance (T2 Declared, ~8s baseline). Real GA4 extraction tracked separately as T2.5 — must upgrade to T1 before final UCC merge (Block G + T42).

tasks.title: Write fitme-story/scripts/sync-from-fittracker2.ts + JSON schema validation + freshness.json
Add prebuild hook in fitme-story/package.json
vercel.json build cmd: shallow clone FT2 with deploy key + document procedure
Unit test for sync script (mock FS)
Local-dev verification: prebuild + dev → all data appears
middleware.ts Layer 1 — basic-auth gate matcher /control-room/:path*
Layer 2 — sitemap.ts excludes + robots.ts disallow
Layer 3 — next.config.ts DASHBOARD_BUILD env var + IgnorePlugin
verify-blind-switch.sh — 5 acceptance assertions
CI job runs verify-blind-switch.sh on relevant PRs
ESLint rule: no reverse imports from showcase to control-room/
Document Vercel env-var setup in EXTRACTION-RECIPE.md
Map dashboard tailwind palette → fitme-story tokens; produce mapping table
Pre-migration WCAG audit (axe MCP); contrast report
Resolve T16 contrast failures
Port Dashboard.jsx → src/app/control-room/layout.tsx
tasks.note: Ported Dashboard.jsx chrome to layout.tsx — header (brand icon + title + 2 badges) + 5-tab primary nav (Overview built, Board/Table/Tasks/Knowledge as 'soon' placeholders) + Framework Health secondary nav. Stat pills + workspaces dropdown + AlertsBanner + PipelineOverview deferred to T20+T24+T27.

tasks.title: Port controlCenterPrimitives → src/components/control-room/primitives.tsx
tasks.note: Ported 8 primitives (Panel, MetricList, InfoTile, DriftList, ModeBadge, DocumentCard, DocumentGroupCard, EmptyState) to TypeScript with explicit prop interfaces. ~280 lines incl. JSDoc. Tailwind classes preserved verbatim — re-skin to fitme-story tokens deferred to post-T20-T28 visual review per token-map.md.

tasks.title: Port ControlRoom → src/app/control-room/page.tsx with Hero + NumbersPanel verbatim
Port KanbanBoard → src/app/control-room/board/page.tsx (full UX spec)
Port TableView → src/app/control-room/table/page.tsx (full UX spec)
Port KnowledgeHub → src/app/control-room/knowledge/page.tsx
Port AlertsBanner, SourceHealth, FeatureCard, TaskCard, ThemeToggle
tasks.note: Wave 2 supporting components ported with re-skin to fitme-story tokens per token-map.md. AlertsBanner decoupled from direct analytics import via onAcknowledge callback (T36 will wire GA4). ThemeToggle uses useSyncExternalStore (React 19 set-state-in-effect compliant). SourceHealth is RSC-compatible; the other 4 are 'use client'. tsc + eslint clean. Layout/page wiring intentionally deferred to T25/T26/T27/T29/T36.

tasks.title: Data-freshness footer reading freshness.json
tasks.note: DataFreshnessFooter RSC reads src/data/freshness.json; renders 'Last synced N ago · counts' under every /control-room/* page via layout.tsx; flips to red-warning state when staleness > 6h per PRD FR-8.

tasks.title: Replace TaskBoard with flat TaskCard grid
tasks.note: New /control-room/tasks server component using parseStateFiles() to flatten tasks across all features into 4 status buckets (in_progress/ready/blocked/done). PRIMARY_NAV Tasks flipped from soon-placeholder to active link. Required fix(build) PR #34 (fitme-story) to land first because the chain page.tsx → parsers/state.ts → types.ts surfaced a Turbopack new-URL resolution bug.

tasks.title: Replace PipelineOverview with phase legend + recent-activity strip
tasks.note: PhaseLegendAndActivity RSC composes PhaseLegend (4 buckets matching FeatureCard accent colors) + RecentActivityStrip (top-5 events from src/data/shared/change-log.json, sorted desc). Wired into Overview page between Live modules and migration paragraph.

tasks.title: Remove CaseStudiesView; nav link → /case-studies
tasks.note: Added 'Case studies →' to SECONDARY_NAV in layout.tsx; trailing arrow signals leaving /control-room. Dashboard's CaseStudiesView.jsx was already absent from Wave 1 layout port.

tasks.title: Replace DependencyGraph with simple task-tree
tasks.note: TaskTree component replaces dashboard's 207-line SVG DependencyGraph with topologically-sorted indented list + critical-path emphasis. Component shipped as reusable primitive without an immediate consumer (per task description's omission allowance); future hosts include per-feature drill-down + Cmd+K palette.

tasks.title: View persistence via localStorage + ?reset=true URL param
tasks.note: useViewPrefs<T> hook (useSyncExternalStore-backed for hydration + cross-tab sync + lint compliance) + TableViewClient client island with sortable column headers + global search + Reset View button. ?reset=true URL param clears storage and replaces URL via history.replaceState.

tasks.title: Command palette (Cmd+K) — global keyboard shortcuts (Linear-style)
tasks.note: Hand-rolled (no cmdk/kbar dep) modal palette mounted in layout.tsx. Three command groups: Navigate (7 routes), Actions (Reset prefs / Toggle dark mode / Open GitHub), Features (50+ entries from seed pointing at FT2 state.json on GitHub). Full a11y (role=dialog, role=listbox, aria-activedescendant). Lint-safe via onQueryChange handler resetting selectedIndex (avoids React 19 set-state-in-effect).

tasks.title: Port controlCenter.js builder + 7 parsers → src/lib/control-room/builder.ts (TS)
tasks.note: Ported via cherry-pick PR (UCC Path A). Builder + 7 parsers shipped to src/lib/control-room/.

tasks.title: Port github.js → src/lib/control-room/github.ts
tasks.note: github.ts shipped alongside T31 parsers via UCC Path A cherry-pick PR.

tasks.title: Port dashboard tests → vitest suite under src/lib/control-room/__tests__/
tasks.note: 34 tests via node:test, all pass. UCC Path A cherry-pick PR.

tasks.title: Mark dashboard/ historical with README + git history note
tasks.note: Prepended HISTORICAL banner to dashboard/README.md pointing at fitme-story/src/{app,components,lib}/control-room/. References the V2 Rule retention policy (indefinite) + extraction recipe + future T35 redirect. Original Stack/Features/etc content preserved below a (Historical context follows) delimiter.

tasks.title: Configure fit-tracker2.vercel.app → fitme-story.vercel.app/control-room redirect
tasks.note: 307 redirect shipped via dashboard/vercel.json; verified live (HTTP/2 307 with location: https://fitme-story.vercel.app/control-room). Per user authorization 2026-05-06, the legacy fit-tracker2 Vercel project was DELETED post-verification (vercel project rm). fit-tracker2.vercel.app now returns Vercel's default 404; discovery path is via the showcase Control Center nav (fitme-story PR #37). Deviates from PRD §13's 30-day rollback window in favor of cleaner end-state; legacy code stays in dashboard/ folder per V2 Rule retention (T34 marker).

tasks.title: Wire 8 GA4 events via @next/third-parties/google
tasks.note: All 8 PRD §10.1 events wired. Phase 1 (#33): analytics.ts helpers + TrackPageView island for dashboard_load + dashboard_sync_warning_shown on Overview/Board/Knowledge. Phase 2 (#35): TrackedNavLink (dashboard_view_change), TrackedExternalLink (dashboard_external_link), TrackedDocLink (dashboard_knowledge_open), InstrumentedAlertsBanner (dashboard_blocker_acknowledged), TableViewClient handlers (dashboard_filter_apply with debounced search), commands.ts openExternal hook for palette tracking, plus TrackPageView added to /tasks + /table pages. dashboard_kanban_drag stubbed in Phase 1 (drag UX not yet shipped).

tasks.title: Add 8 rows to docs/product/analytics-taxonomy.csv
tasks.note: 8 dashboard_* event rows added (Dashboard category) + 1 conversion event (dashboard_blocker_acknowledged → TTC funnel). All comply with CLAUDE.md Analytics Naming Convention (snake_case + screen-prefix + ≤40 char + PII-free + 1 conversion flagged).

tasks.title: Analytics unit tests (MockAnalyticsAdapter pattern, web equivalent)
tasks.note: 13 tests across 5 suites at src/lib/control-room/analytics.test.ts. Pattern: node:test + node:assert/strict (matches existing builder.test.ts/reconcile.test.ts; no extra runner dep). Coverage: payload routing (8 helpers × 1 round-trip test) + server safety (no window) + gtag-missing safety + error tolerance (throwing gtag) + timeSinceLoadMs boundary checks. All green (~324ms).

tasks.title: EXTRACTION-RECIPE.md (7-step playbook + manual-trigger CI verification)
tasks.note: EXTRACTION-RECIPE.md shipped via UCC Path A cherry-pick PR.

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md Skills ecosystem section
tasks.note: CLAUDE.md Skills ecosystem section updated. T40 cherry-picked from feat/ucc-t31-builder-port.

tasks.title: Update fitme-story README with /control-room mention + blind-switch pattern
tasks.note: fitme-story README operator-dashboard section. UCC Path A cherry-pick PR.

tasks.title: Write feature case study with v7.6 outlier-flag pattern + honest tier tags
tasks.note: Phase 8 case study published. Tier-tagged per data-quality-tiers.md (T1 wherever extracted from state.json/git/code; T2 where declared from observed behavior; T2.5 deferred status documented openly). Honest disclosures section covers: pre-state TTC unmeasurable / CI side-fix during window / Turbopack regression / PR #37→#38 follow-up / PRD §13 30-day rollback window deviated. Lessons-for-future-migrations section seeds 5 takeaways for next cross-repo feature.

tasks.title: Upgrade T2 baseline-ttc.json from T2 (Declared placeholder) to T1 (Instrumented from GA4)
tasks.deferred_reason: Legacy Astro dashboard at fit-tracker2.vercel.app was effectively unmeasurable by the time the 7-day baseline window closed (clicking AlertsBanner did not fire dashboard_blocker_acknowledged events on subsequent visits; only 2 historical events visible from earlier testing, not a usable sample). Rather than fight the legacy surface for a contrived pre-state baseline, T2.5 is deferred: the new fitme-story dashboard ships with all 8 events wired (T36) and post-launch GA4 data on the new surface establishes the production baseline. Honest framing per data-quality-tiers.md: pre-migration sample is T2 (Declared, ~8s) with sample_size=2 noisy; post-migration measurement on the new surface will be T1 (Instrumented) once 7+ days of operator traffic accumulate.
tasks.note: Original intent was an upgrade path T2→T1 against the legacy Astro dashboard. Path abandoned 2026-05-06 in favor of post-launch measurement on the new dashboard. Pre-state baseline remains T2 Declared with documented small-sample caveat in baseline-ttc.json. Post-launch T1 measurement is a non-blocking follow-up (no T2.7 task created — the new dashboard's GA4 events fire automatically and the T1 read is a lightweight query against future data, not a code change).

transitions.note: Arch A confirmed. New requirement: blind-switch + future-extraction. PRD must commit to all three layers of visibility control.
All 4 PRD §15 open questions answered with defaults (B/A/A/A). Showcase stays publicly accessible — only /control-room/* is gated.
Phase 3 open questions answered: full UX spec for KanbanBoard+TableView, fitme-story Hero verbatim, Cmd+K command palette in scope (added as T30.5).

User said continue. Starting T1 (instrument current Astro dashboard) immediately so 7-day baseline clock starts. T15 + T8/T9/T10/T13 (parallelizable infra) can also proceed — none block on T2 baseline data.
All implementation-block tasks done (43/44 + 1 deferred). T2.5 deferred per documented reason. CI passing across both repos. User explicit approval at session close 2026-05-06.
T6/T11/T16/T33/T38 tests all passing. Analytics suite (T38) 13/13 green. pm-framework/pr-integrity gate green on every PR. CI clean on FT2 + fitme-story main.

20 PRs merged across both repos. Live-verified: control-room/* gated by basic-auth, all 8 GA4 events firing, fit-tracker2 redirect functional then legacy project deleted per user authorization, showcase Control Center nav live, framework health page populating from synced data after PR #39.

Phase 8 case study at docs/case-studies/unified-control-center-case-study.md (FT2 #230, ~530 lines, tier-tagged with 5 honest disclosures). Daily sync routine trig_01ThxQphvQQa8tyWMsxiyhdm scheduled for 09:00 IDT daily.

Showcase MDX published at fitme-story/content/04-case-studies/23a-unified-control-center.mdx. Memory updated. Feature formally CLOSED. T2.5 deferred remains the only non-done task; post-launch baseline measurement on the new dashboard will close it organically.

factors_applied.reason: Touches dashboard repo, fitme-story repo, .claude/shared/*.json data layer, and the broader PM workflow output
First migration of dashboard from Astro to Next.js + first cross-repo component sharing with fitme-story; first cross-Vercel-project unification
Multi-screen dashboard (control room + case studies + new sub-routes); 4+ views
Reads framework-manifest.json + 9 other shared files + state.json + Linear MCP + Notion MCP

complexity.computed_cu_note: Will be computed at session_end based on tasks count + factors

requirements_added_during_research.blind_switch: Dashboard must be invisible to outside sources when product goes live (3 layers: route-level auth gate, sitemap+robots exclusion, build-time inclusion flag).
requirements_added_during_research.future_extraction_ready: Architecture must allow clean extraction of dashboard back to internal-only access. Co-locate all dashboard code under control-room/ prefix; no reverse imports from showcase.

T43-T54.rationale: Framework-health dashboard naturally surfaces v7.7 outputs (Tier 1.1/3.2 trends, automation map, human-action checklist). Absorption avoids parallel track.
